control_name.label: Control Name
control_name.description: The control name that identifies the field and it submitted data. It's required and must be unique for the current Form Area.

control_id.label: ID Attribute
control_id.description: An unique identifier for the field.

control_placeholder.label: Placeholder
control_placeholder.description: An optional text to be shown when the field has no value set.

control_min.label: Min
control_min.description: Value must be greater than or equal to mininum.

control_max.label: Max
control_max.description: Value must be lower than or equal to maximum.

control_mincount.label: Min
control_mincount.description: Value count must be greater than or equal to mininum.

control_maxcount.label: Max
control_maxcount.description: Value count must be lower than or equal to maximum.

control_minlength.label: Min Length
control_minlength.description: Value length must be greater than or equal to mininum.

control_maxlength.label: Max Length
control_maxlength.description: Value length must be lower than or equal to maximum.

control_mindate.label: Min
control_mindate.description: Date must be greater than or equal to mininum.

control_maxdate.label: Max
control_maxdate.description: Date must be lower than or equal to maximum.

control_mintime.label: Min
control_mintime.description: Time must be greater than or equal to mininum.

control_maxtime.label: Max
control_maxtime.description: Time must be lower than or equal to maximum.

control_minmonth.label: Min
control_minmonth.description: Month must greater than or equal to mininum.

control_maxmonth.label: Max
control_maxmonth.description: Month must lower than or equal to maximum.

control_minweek.label: Min
control_minweek.description: Weel must greater than or equal to mininum.

control_maxweek.label: Max
control_maxweek.description: Weel must lower than or equal to maximum.

control_step.label: Step
control_step.description: Value will be multiple of step.

control_pattern.label: Pattern
control_pattern.description: Value must match the regular expression pattern.

control_error_message.label: Error Message
control_error_message.description: Override the default error message. Use {fieldlabel} as placeholder for the field label.
